title: PEI Transfection Protocol
author: Nobody
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y9vfz66

steps.title: Split cells into wells - see relevant protocol
steps.instruction: Split cells into wells - see relevant protocol

steps.title: Make a solution of - 500ng transfection DNA - 2
steps.instruction: Make a solution of - 500ng transfection DNA - 2.5ul PET - Serum Free Media (OptiMEM) up to 50ul

steps.title: Vortex solution twice for 5 seconds...
steps.instruction: Vortex solution twice for 5 seconds Leave solution to incubate in hood for 15 minutes Add 50ul of solution per well (500ul) Incubate for 24-48hrs

steps.title: View fluorescence under microscope Fix cells
steps.instruction: View fluorescence under microscope Fix cells
